test.note: Tests pass. One pre-existing worktree test failure (worktree fixture pnpm install) is unrelated to autopilot features. 9 autopilot-specific tests for VAL-AUTOPILOT-039/040/041 all pass.

typecheck.note: All 20 workspace packages typecheck passed in ~240s.

lint.note: No packages have a lint script (exit code 0) — same as advanced-execution finding.

build.note: UI, server, and CLI built successfully in ~26s.

nonBlockingIssues: Learner summary auto-creation only fires for completed runs (success/failure) — cancelled runs may not produce summaries, but this is acceptable
Knowledge type filter uses inline union type instead of importing KnowledgeType from constants.ts — minor redundancy, no runtime impact
Digest priority assignment uses hardcoded thresholds — acceptable for current scope, may need tuning as usage grows

appliedUpdates.description: Document that 'pnpm -r lint' returns 0 with no lint script in most packages — lint check is effectively a no-op pass for this project structure (carried from advanced-execution)
